title: Bat Membranes
description: Plugin | Bats drop membranes instead of Phantoms which are disabled
body:
![Bisect Hosting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bab445b70d606b96245d2dcb0fe9756d1f09c69.webp)
### [Use our code " withrage " to get 25% discount!](https://bisecthosting.com/withrage)
# BAT MEMBRANES
Phantoms are disabled and bats drop phantom membranes intead. They have **25%** chance to drop **1 membrane** and **15%** chance to drop **2 membranes** by default. This can be changed in the config file.

This plugin is also available on **[Spigot](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/bat-membranes.120777/)** and **[CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/bukkit-plugins/bat-membranes)**!

![Bats dropping phantom membranes and their drop percentages](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/638ea7123824499ad8f5509d7680569fcc821c52_0.webp)
![Phantoms are disabled](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfb05569c42bfbc8c48bcc8d01555809bf676117_0.webp)
